name: NextFeed
description: Offline-friendly RSS and Atom reader for NextUI devices.
author: Eric Reinsmidt

0.1.0: HTTP fetch via libcurl with HTTPS (bundled CA certs)
Article detail with source domain, publish date, smart description filtering
Native NextUI look via Apostrophe with disabled wallpaper background
0.2.0: Disk caching of raw XML per feed
Auto-refresh on launch (feeds older than 1 hour)
Article count shown next to feed names
Feed management: add, edit, delete, reorder
Double-decode XML entities for Reddit compatibility
Status bar with clock, battery, WiFi
